caption: A hand interacts with a mechanical assembly, likely part of a vehicle's engine or drivetrain, characterized by metallic components, a chain, and a black metal bracket. In the initial sequence, a person's hand reaches into the frame to press a white, hexagonal foam plug into a circular opening on the black bracket. As the sequence progresses, the hand withdraws, leaving the plug firmly seated in the hole. The final moments show the hand returning to point at a bolt head located on the right side of the same black bracket. The background consists of various greasy, metallic engine parts and a drive shaft. There are no visible people other than the hand, no clothing, and no on-screen text or logos present across the sequence.
